query:
SELECT 
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(t.value, '$.id')) as team_id,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(t.value, '$.name')) as team_name,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(t.value, '$.primaryOwner')) as owner_id,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(t.value, '$.record.overall.wins')) as wins,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(t.value, '$.record.overall.losses')) as losses,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(t.value, '$.points')) as pf,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(t.value, '$.record.overall.pointsAgainst')) as pa,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(t.value, '$.playoffSeed')) as playoff_seed,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(t.value, '$.rankFinal')) as rank_final
FROM espn_season_cache c,
  JSON_TABLE(c.payload, '$.teams[*]' COLUMNS (value JSON PATH '$')) AS t
WHERE c.season = 2025 AND c.viewName = 'combined'
ORDER BY CAST(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(t.value, '$.record.overall.wins')) AS UNSIGNED) DESC;
